chunks.title: Job's Lament and Questioning of Strength
chunks.reason: A continuous monologue where Job weighs his suffering against his words and questions the source of his endurance.

chunks.title: Critique of Friends' Betrayal
chunks.reason: Job compares his friends to drying wadis and lists the specific demands he claims they expected from him.

chunks.title: Call for Honest Reproof
chunks.reason: Job challenges his friends to examine his words and offers a final defense of his integrity.
